title: rosa × collina var. catarractarum
intro: Rosa × collina var. catarractarum, commonly known as the wild rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. catarractarum include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, among others. Traditional herbal preparations of Rosa × collina var. catarractarum include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
